---
title: Editorial
draft: no
author:
- name: Emi Tanaka
  affiliation: Australian National University
  url: https://journal.r-project.org
  email: r-journal@r-project.org
date: '2026-03-01'
creative_commons: CC BY
output:
  rjtools::rjournal_article:
    self_contained: yes
    toc: no
volume: 18
issue: 1
slug: RJ-2026-1-editorial
journal:
  lastpage: 4
  firstpage: 4

---

NA
---
